'''âch-zh-s''' ('''kachazhas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:neaten|neaten]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-zh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:neaten|neaten]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-zh-s
|-
! Lemma
| kachazhas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichazhas|thichazhas]] || [[word:jichazhas|jichazhas]] || [[word:shichazhas|shichazhas]] || [[word:kichazhas|kichazhas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchazhas|thuthuchazhas]] || [[word:jujuchazhas|jujuchazhas]] || [[word:shushuchazhas|shushuchazhas]] || [[word:kukuchazhas|kukuchazhas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchazhas|thuchazhas]] || [[word:juchazhas|juchazhas]] || [[word:shuchazhas|shuchazhas]] || [[word:kuchazhas|kuchazhas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchazhas|thuchazhas]] || [[word:juchazhas|juchazhas]] || [[word:shuchazhas|shuchazhas]] || [[word:kuchazhas|kuchazhas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechazhas|thechazhas]] || [[word:jechazhas|jechazhas]] || [[word:shechazhas|shechazhas]] || [[word:kechazhas|kechazhas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochazhas|thothochazhas]] || [[word:jojochazhas|jojochazhas]] || [[word:shoshochazhas|shoshochazhas]] || [[word:kokochazhas|kokochazhas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochazhas|thochazhas]] || [[word:jochazhas|jochazhas]] || [[word:shochazhas|shochazhas]] || [[word:kochazhas|kochazhas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochazhas|thochazhas]] || [[word:jochazhas|jochazhas]] || [[word:shochazhas|shochazhas]] || [[word:kochazhas|kochazhas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠchazhas|thĂŠchazhas]] || [[word:jĂŠchazhas|jĂŠchazhas]] || [[word:shĂŠchazhas|shĂŠchazhas]] || [[word:kĂŠchazhas|kĂŠchazhas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachazhas|thathachazhas]] || [[word:jajachazhas|jajachazhas]] || [[word:shashachazhas|shashachazhas]] || [[word:kakachazhas|kakachazhas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachazhas|thachazhas]] || [[word:jachazhas|jachazhas]] || [[word:shachazhas|shachazhas]] || [[word:kachazhas|kachazhas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachazhas|thachazhas]] || [[word:jachazhas|jachazhas]] || [[word:shachazhas|shachazhas]] || [[word:kachazhas|kachazhas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachazhas|shachazhas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachazhas|goshachazhas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachazhas|gokishachazhas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachazhasnĂŒ|shachazhasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhasnknĂŒ|goshachazhasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhasnĂŒ|gokishachazhasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachazhashĂ«|shachazhashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachazhasnkshĂ«|goshachazhasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachazhashĂ«|gokishachazhashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhasro|shachazhasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhasnkro|goshachazhasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhasro|gokishachazhasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhasmu|shachazhasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhasnkmu|goshachazhasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhasmu|gokishachazhasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachazhasher|shachazhasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachazhasnksher|goshachazhasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachazhasher|gokishachazhasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachazhasng|shachazhasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachazhasnkng|goshachazhasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachazhasng|gokishachazhasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachazhasya|shachazhasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachazhasnkya|goshachazhasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachazhasya|gokishachazhasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachazhasyam|shachazhasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachazhasnkyam|goshachazhasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachazhasyam|gokishachazhasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhasnĂŒshĂ«|shachazhasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshachazhasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishachazhasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhasnĂŒro|shachazhasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhasnknĂŒro|goshachazhasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhasnĂŒro|gokishachazhasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhasnĂŒmu|shachazhasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhasnknĂŒmu|goshachazhasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhasnĂŒmu|gokishachazhasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhashĂ«nĂŒ|shachazhashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshachazhasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishachazhashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhashĂ«ro|shachazhashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhasnkshĂ«ro|goshachazhasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhashĂ«ro|gokishachazhashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhashĂ«mu|shachazhashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhasnkshĂ«mu|goshachazhasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhashĂ«mu|gokishachazhashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhasronĂŒ|shachazhasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhasnkronĂŒ|goshachazhasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhasronĂŒ|gokishachazhasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhasroshĂ«|shachazhasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhasnkroshĂ«|goshachazhasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhasroshĂ«|gokishachazhasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachazhasromu|shachazhasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachazhasnkromu|goshachazhasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachazhasromu|gokishachazhasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachazhasmunĂŒ|shachazhasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachazhasnkmunĂŒ|goshachazhasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachazhasmunĂŒ|gokishachazhasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachazhasmushĂ«|shachazhasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachazhasnkmushĂ«|goshachazhasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachazhasmushĂ«|gokishachazhasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachazhasmuro|shachazhasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachazhasnkmuro|goshachazhasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachazhasmuro|gokishachazhasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
